Jagged Metal Shard  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 27
DMG: 5 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 5
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except CLR PAL DRU MNK SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Jagged Metal Shard
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 27
DMG: 5 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 5
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except CLR PAL DRU MNK SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Fragment of Dagger
Item Type:1H Piercing
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:0 pp 5 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:120
Submitted By:Gumin Sowslave
Lucy Entry By:jagg
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 03:41:10
Page Updated:Sun Jun 25th, 2017

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 30
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Crypt of Dalnir
NPC Name
a sly kly imprecator

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Cabilis East
Quest Name
Visceral Dagger

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Crypt of Dalnir


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
a sly kly imprecator
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2023 at 6:42 PM Rating: Decent
Tzaddik
3 posts
Parked my SK in the "wry" imp room. He popped several times in an hour before dropping the dagger hilt. Next camped the "a sly kly imprecator" room (Laboratory) for hours before realizing that Jaxun is right and parked two other toons in the "wry" room and "shy" room in order to clear out placeholders. Took around 8 pops for "sly" to appear and drop the jagged metal shard.

So yes, park a toon in each imp room to clear placeholders in order to force a pop.
▲ Page top
Imprecator in lab room
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2010 at 12:24 PM Rating: Decent
FairTrade
Scholar
18 posts
I hunted him for 2 days of placeholders and after reading the information posted by JaxunDarkheart, I went back through Dalnir and made sure that none of the other imprecators were up (one had been), and then returned to the lab room. Within the next hour or so of clearing the placeholder he spawned. This may support the theory that only one of them will spawn in the zone at a time?
____________________________
<Fair Trade>
▲ Page top
This is kinda ridiculous
QuoteReply
# Feb 06 2004 at 12:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591800490239
2 posts
I've been camping the Imprecator in the Lab on the third floor for over three days now. Still not a single pop. I've tried keeping all the spawn points clear, I've tried making sure the imprecator wasn't in any of the other two spawn points, I've tried everything my frustrated mind could think up.

*edit*
I think I may have found a way to make him spawn. Keep in mind I say "may". I didn't stick around after getting my jagged shard since I was so eager to get out of this place.

When camping the lab with my ranger (so I could use his track), I noticed the Imprecator upstairs kept spawning. As a last ditch effort, I hit the teleporter, went back in, and camped the Imprecator room upstairs. I killed the Imp that was already up, cleared some of the hallways spawns to keep busy and hit my tracking. The Imp was up, but not upstairs. After a quick check in the church, he wasn't there, I was elated. Ran to the lab, offed the Imp, looted the final shard and hit the teleporter.

I would strongly advise having a tracker along when camping. Maybe we can get someone else to verify if this method works.

Jaxun Darkheart
51 Reaver of E'CI

Edited, Fri Feb 6 13:07:44 2004
▲ Page top
RE: This is kinda ridiculous
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2004 at 1:22 PM Rating: Decent
treyer
View User Forum
Scholar
104 posts
I've been doing the same thing over and over with my ranger for days and still no lab imprecator. These spawns are sick for what you get, lol. I just keep running in circles, killing the KI in the alcove and moving down to the lab... over and over and over, meanwhile killing possible PHers.

Trezzt Tolax ~ SK on Fennin Ro
Treygolas Fayder ~ Ranger on FR

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 30 2003 at 4:56 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i am getting no where with this quest. i have had lab camped for SIX DAYS now. you have any idea how boring it is to be by yourself in such an unpopular dungeon??? six freaking days ive been waiting to get the jagged metal shard...i got the other 3 pieces all in a row in like... maybe an hour and a half the first day i started this particular quest... now... 5 days later... still down here, in this stinking dungeon, practically screaming at my moniter screen every time i see a new mob pop thats NOT named a Kly Imprecator. PAYING 500+ PP FOR THIS ITEM ON VAZAELLE SERVER, PST TO JERGORY OR SNOWFOOT, OR E-MAIL ME AT Jergory420@yahoo.com . thanks in advance
NEED THIS
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2002 at 12:47 PM Rating: Default
Darknyss
Scholar
551 posts
***PAYING*** 100pp for this... I'm an Iksar ShadowKnight in search of the Greenmist Khukri and I need one of these to continue.

Unfortunately, I don't have the 13+ hours needed to camp this stupid thing all day.

Why do the casual players always get so shafted...

BTW, I'm on the Drinal Server and if you have any friends that might have this, please let them know I'm in desperate need of this.... god... I can hear the "Oh, i just destroyed the 4 I got" posts already... /cry
____________________________
Pain Lord Darknyss Grimscale
92 Iksar Crusader of the Greenmist

I was lucky enough to buy mine from a vendor in Cabilis, for 2p:) hehe...I've also seen many people selling them in East Commonlands on the Bristlebane Server, so you can probably buy cheap from people who do not know the use of the shard:)

I am trying not to burst from your stupidity.
Asps drop a Giant snake fang.
Read the text NOW
NOW

Also, come back with the fang, and try to do the Visceral dagger quest with it please?
I hope I have reavealed your stupidity.

Long Wait
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2001 at 6:29 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Camped the imp that dropped this for 8 hours in one day and he didnt spawn. Friend camed it fer 15 hours and no spawn. I even heard of folks camping this thing for 40+ hours and the friggin thing didnt spawn. This is horrible heh... u take the time to get the other items and gotta camp the lab for weeks. Apparently the imp in the lab is a extremely rare spawn. You have been warned!
